title: Senior Sales
description:
Responsibilities:

Develop and execute strategic sales plans to achieve business objectives.

Cultivate and maintain strong relationships with existing and potential clients (Hedge Fund, Commodities Trading Company, HFT Prop, etc) in the global market.

Conduct comprehensive market research and analysis to identify opportunities for business expansion.

Collaborate with internal teams to tailor solutions that meet the unique needs of clients.

Stay abreast of developments in both Chinese and global financial markets, including regulatory changes and industry trends.

Exceed sales targets through effective client acquisition and retention strategies.

Provide exceptional customer service to ensure client satisfaction and loyalty.

Prepare and deliver compelling presentations on the company's products and services to clients.

Work closely with marketing teams to develop promotional materials and campaigns.

Maintain accurate records of sales activities and manage a comprehensive client database.

Requirements:

Bachelor’s degree in finance, Business, Economics, or a related field.

A minimum of three years of experience in Futures Brokerage or a similar role.

In-depth knowledge of both Chinese and global financial markets.

Fluency in both English and Chinese, with excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Proven track record of consistently meeting and exceeding sales targets.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Exceptional interpersonal and relationship-building abilities.

Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team.

Detail-oriented with excellent organizational and time management skills.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and other relevant software.

CMFAS Modules M1a, M2a, M6, M6a Certifications are required.

postedCompany.description:
Guotai Junan Futures, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Guotai Junan Securities, is a market leader and pioneer of promoting internationalization in China’s futures market. Since the inception in 2007, it has successfully transformed from a ‘brokerage oriented’ futures company to a large ‘comprehensive financial service provider’ with diversified businesses, including futures and options brokerage, futures investment consulting, asset management, risk management and OTC derivatives execution.

Guotai Junan Futures is the No. 1 full clearing member of China Financial Futures Exchange (CFFEX), and is registered as a full member of Dalian Commodity Exchange (DCE), Shanghai Futures Exchange (SHFE), Zhengzhou Commodity Exchange (ZCE), and Shanghai International Energy Exchange (INE).

Guotai Junan Futures has maintained ‘AA Level of A Class’ by China Securities Regulatory Commission (CSRC) since 2018, and has earned many honors over the past decade such as ‘Top 10 Chinese Futures Company’, ‘Top Financial Institutions’ and ‘The Best Futures Product Innovation Award’. Guotai Junan Futures is dedicated to become a highly reliable derivatives service provider and risk management partner for clients.
postedCompany.name: GUOTAI JUNAN FUTURES (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
